Alys Stackspear
Allegiances
  • House Stackspear
  • House Lannister
Culture Westermen
Born ~192–233 AC[1]
Died 244 AC or 245 AC[1]
Father Lord Stackspear
Spouse Ser Jason Lannister
Issue Damon Lannister
Book The World of Ice & Fire (appendix)

Alys Stackspear was a noblewoman of House Stackspear, and the first wife of Jason Lannister. She was the mother of Damon Lannister.[2]

History[ ]

According to a semi-canon source, the fifteen-year-old Jason Lannister deflowered the maiden Alys in 244 AC, getting her pregnant. Jason and Alys were married because of this, but Alys would eventually die giving birth to the child, named Damon.[2][3]
